title: acmella iodiscaea
intro: Acmella iodiscaea, also known as the Szechuan button or toothache plant, is a species of flowering plant in the dill family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to numb the tongue and reduce inflammation. Acmella iodiscaea has been traditionally used to treat toothaches, headaches, and other painful conditions due to its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, offering health benefits such as pain relief and improved digestion. Herbal preparations of Acmella iodiscaea include tea, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
